ideation: This animation sequence will visually represent the looping nature of the repeat single button.  The animation will focus on a single arm repeatedly tapping a point in front of the robot, mimicking the action of pressing a repeat button. The other arm will remain largely stationary to emphasize the focused action of the active arm.  The animation will utilize a combination of joint1 and joint2 movements, with subtle wrist adjustments for visual appeal. To start, both arms will hang loosely at the sides. The right arm will then extend forward, mimicking a button press, before returning to its starting position. This cycle will repeat for a total of four frames.

frames.beat: right arm extends forward to press repeat
right arm returns to rest, loop complete
right arm extends again to press repeat
